questions.question: Describe the differences between a Master Slave and Peer-to-Peer distributed system. Provide an example of each type.
questions.hint: Focus on the characteristics of each type

questions.question: Explain the concept of homogeneity in distributed systems. How does it impact the performance of a distributed system?
questions.hint: Focus on the impact of homogeneity on performance

questions.question: What is the primary function of a naming service in a distributed system? Provide an example of a naming service.
questions.hint: Focus on the key function of the naming service
